gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewed release-bundle provenance changes, flagged wheel filename/payload validation issues, and reported Clean after fixes.
verification: poetry run pytest -q tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py
GPT-5.5 review clean after resolving findings
what_changed: Added release-bundle provenance artifacts for the tested package wheel and PR-evidence sidecars.
Kept strict release-evidence/preflight matching scoped to V1 benchmark, storage, and native engine-probe inputs while allowing optional provenance artifacts.
Preserved valid wheel basenames in release bundles and validated wheel payloads as real archives with .dist-info/WHEEL metadata.
why: Published AWS g5/UC release bundles should be reproducible and auditable, carrying both the exact wheel that was tested and PR traceability without weakening benchmark release validation.
